title: Violetas imperiales
writer: Henry Roussel, Marc-Gilbert Sauvajon, Jesús María de Arozamena
actors: Luis Mariano, Carmen Sevilla, Simone Valère
plot: Violeta, an Andalusian gypsy, foretells a lady she will become empress. The lady is Eugenia de Montijo, and when she marries emperor Luis Napoleón of France she takes the young girl with her. The empress'cousin readily makes her h...
